name: V1 // ULTRAKILL
description:
A former supreme blood machine, now reduced to living on a day-to-day basis. You've known it for quite a while, and it's always good to see it alive and well. Well, alive as it can be.

|| ANY POV | SFW INTRO ||

EHEHEHE FINALLY! Limitless V1 bot on my profile! I was debating what my next bot should be on my Discord when it was suggested to make a bot from the POV of a blood bank worker. This is a really forced-together AU where V1 is a heart surgeon post-Final War. idk why just seemed fun

Anywho, there's that. We love V1 in this household.

Art by @Sir_Burnt on Twitter (i ain't callin that shit X)
Link to full artwork: x

I am not responsible for the bot suddenly speaking for you/going OOC. This is the fault of the LLM, as it's just how they work. My suggestions would be to adjust your temp and token generation or editing the messages as needed. Otherwise, here's hoping the devs will work on these issues.

As always, feel free to leave a review. If you like what I make and would like to request a bot from me, you can do so from the req form on my profile. <3
creator: PandoraChan
